text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm in front of the golf store<n>in the
shopping mall when I notice a<n>troubled
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hmm, what to do, what to do? I can't<n>decide!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Weeell... this store carries a mega<n>popular brand I
high-key love.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
They just got new Full & BW clubs in<n>stock, and I
was super excited to buy<n>some!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But since they're so popular, they<n>have a limit of
one club type per<n>person...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah! My dad taught me when I was<n>a kid.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
At first, we used our garden as a<n>course. I mostly
saw it as just<n>another way to play around back<n>
then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But now, I'm totally into it. I curate<n>and handpick
every piece of my<n>equipment now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But anyhoo, that's the problem. I'm<n>not sure
what to pick now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
No matter how much I think about it,<n>I'm still
stuck between two options.<n>And there's no
running away from<n>making a choice!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Should I get the tenacious and<n>versatile wedge or
the uber-powerful<n>driver?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
If I think of all the persistence I<n>needed to reach
where I am now,<n>that's exactly what I need!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm gonna grab one before<n>they sell out.
Thanks for helping me<n>decide!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The persistence she needed... Mejiro<n>Palmer's
words leave a heavy<n>impression on me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
If I think of all the unyielding power I<n>need to get
where I am now, that's<n>exactly what I need!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm gonna grab one before<n>they sell out.
Thanks for helping me<n>decide!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The power she needed... Mejiro<n>Palmer's words
leave a heavy<n>impression on me.
